page_header.label: COMPLIANCE
page_header.title: Regulatory Positioning
page_header.description: How ZKIRA Pay approaches compliance and regulation.

sections.heading: Our Position
paragraphs: ZKIRA Pay is a privacy tool, not an anonymity tool. We enable confidential payments — not untraceable ones. Our approach balances user privacy with regulatory clarity and compliance requirements.

sections.heading: How ZKIRA Differs from Mixers
paragraphs: ZKIRA Pay operates fundamentally differently from traditional cryptocurrency mixers:
list: ZKIRA does NOT pool funds from multiple users
No shared liquidity pool or mixing set
Each payment is a direct 1-to-1 escrow between sender and stealth address
Payment creator can always refund unclaimed funds
On-chain escrow is publicly auditable (amounts visible, addresses obfuscated)

sections.heading: Selective Transparency
paragraphs: ZKIRA Pay enables "confidentiality by default, transparency by choice":
list: Users can share viewing keys to prove transactions if required for compliance
Compliance proofs are possible without revealing all transaction activity
Selective disclosure allows users to meet regulatory requirements when necessary
Transaction amounts and escrow contracts remain publicly auditable on-chain

sections.heading: Self-Custodial
paragraphs: ZKIRA is a protocol, not a financial intermediary. We do not hold funds, process payments, or manage user accounts. This self-custodial design means:
list: Users maintain full control of their funds at all times
No central authority can freeze or seize funds
ZKIRA Pay cannot access user funds or transaction data
Regulatory compliance is the responsibility of individual users

sections.heading: Regulatory Engagement
paragraphs: We believe in constructive engagement with regulators and policymakers. Privacy and compliance are not mutually exclusive — they can and should coexist in a well-designed system.
ZKIRA Pay is designed to provide meaningful privacy protection while maintaining the transparency and auditability that regulators require for legitimate oversight.

sections.heading: Jurisdiction Considerations
paragraphs: Users are responsible for compliance with local regulations in their jurisdiction. ZKIRA Pay does not offer services in sanctioned jurisdictions or to sanctioned individuals.
We encourage users to consult with legal counsel regarding the regulatory requirements in their jurisdiction before using privacy-enhancing technologies.

sections.heading: Contact
paragraphs: For regulatory inquiries or compliance-related questions, please contact us at compliance@zkira.xyz.
